title: UnstableCraft Lite
description: A minimal version of UnstableCraft, with only performance, essential utilities, and only the mods required to join the server.
body:
# Reason for Archival:

This version has been archived so I can focus on making the original [UnstableCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/unstablecraft) more optimized, rather than making a band-aid fix for a problem that should've been fixed to begin with.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## About

A chaotic modpack with every mod imaginable, inspired by CrazyCraft or InsaneCraft. This is a personal modpack for some friends of mine on a server, but I might as well make some ad revenue money off of it. We wanted the server to be a loser's version of the Unstable SMP, but that didn't work out, but in remembrance of the original idea, it is called UnstableCraft. Contrary to the name, I hope to make the modpack as stable as I can.

## Performance & Stability

This is a minimal version of [UnstableCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/unstablecraft), featuring only optimizations, essential utilities, and all server-side mods. This version has a much larger emphasis on performance and stability than the original pack.

## Content

This modpack will have the same content as the original modpack, aside from some client side changes. 

## Multiplayer

UnstableCraft Lite is compatible with the server that it is made for.
